ModMetaData.name: War Orphans
ModMetaData.author: Anna
ModMetaData.description:
War Orphans adds a quest where war-torn settlements beg you to take in their orphaned children.
Features: - Receive up to 5 orphaned children of any age, from babies to teens - Children match the faction's xenotype (Waster, Neanderthal, etc.) - Orphans come in sibling groups with shared dead parents - Older children carry babies and toddlers who can't walk - Parents show as deceased in the social tab
Requires Biotech DLC for child mechanics.
